race.comment: QUEUE JUMPER (10) holding his form and looks hard to hold out here from the inside gate with the winkers going on. Nailed late in the soft (7) going when second over 1109m at Echuca. Meets some better types this time but he has the talent to test this line-up. JUGIONG (1) underrated gelding who finds a very average contest first-up. Must shoulder the 65.5kg after closing strongly for a narrow fifth over 1300m at Seymour in BM62 grade last November. Scored a slick 1000m jump out win. Regular rider sticks and expected to go close. NEEDAWINNA (12) gets in light with the claim and has been kept fresh for this . Struggled to see the 1300m out with a disappointing sixth over 1300m at Wodonga. Can get cover from the draw and take a hand in the finish. SHUTTERING (13) lightly raced filly resuming. Came to the end of her prep when last of 9 over 1200m at the Sapphire Coast last February. Back without a trial and likely to go back and be ridden for luck.
